name: SomeIpSDRequireService
title: SomeIpSDRequireService
description: A service that was unregistered at the node (consumer) using the SomeIpSDReleaseService function can be registered again with this function. The associated Service Discovery message (Find Service) is then sent if necessary.

parameters.name: csiHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the required Consumed Service Instance ( see SomeIpCreateConsumedServiceInstance).

return: Handle of the required Consumed Service
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
